{"context": null, "model_input": {"text": "PATHCARE ADVANCED DIAGNOSTICS
NABL Accredited Laboratory | CAP Certified
Registration No: LAB/2024/MH/4521
Address: 200 Medical Center Drive, Building C, Mumbai, MH 400012
Phone: +91-22-5555-0100 | Email: reports@pathcarediag.com

COMPREHENSIVE LABORATORY REPORT

Patient Information:
  Name: Jane Alexandra Smith
  Age/Sex: 38 Years / Female
  Patient ID: PC-2024-78421
  Referring Physician: Dr. Anil Mehta, MD (Internal Medicine)
  Sample Collection Date: 12/03/2024 at 07:30 AM (Fasting)
  Report Date: 13/03/2024
  Sample Type: Venous Blood, Urine
  Sample ID: LAB-2024-00421

COMPLETE BLOOD COUNT (CBC):
  Hemoglobin:           11.2 g/dL        [12.0 - 15.5]    LOW
  RBC Count:            3.8 million/uL   [3.8 - 4.8]      NORMAL
  WBC Count:            7,500 /uL        [4,000 - 11,000]  NORMAL
  Platelet Count:       245,000 /uL      [150,000-400,000] NORMAL
  Hematocrit (PCV):     34.5%            [36.0 - 44.0]     LOW
  MCV:                  88.2 fL          [80 - 100]        NORMAL
  MCH:                  29.1 pg          [27 - 33]         NORMAL
  MCHC:                 33.0 g/dL        [32 - 36]         NORMAL

DIFFERENTIAL COUNT:
  Neutrophils:          62%              [40 - 70]         NORMAL
  Lymphocytes:          28%              [20 - 40]         NORMAL
  Monocytes:            6%               [2 - 8]           NORMAL
  Eosinophils:          3%               [1 - 6]           NORMAL
  Basophils:            1%               [0 - 1]           NORMAL

DIABETES PANEL:
  Fasting Glucose:      108 mg/dL        [70 - 100]        BORDERLINE HIGH
  HbA1c:                6.1%             [< 5.7%]          ELEVATED
  Fasting Insulin:      18.5 uIU/mL     [2.6 - 24.9]      NORMAL
  HOMA-IR:              4.93             [< 2.5]           HIGH

LIPID PROFILE:
  Total Cholesterol:    225 mg/dL        [< 200]           HIGH
  LDL Cholesterol:      148 mg/dL        [< 100]           HIGH
  HDL Cholesterol:      42 mg/dL         [> 50]            LOW
  Triglycerides:        175 mg/dL        [< 150]           HIGH
  VLDL:                 35 mg/dL         [5 - 40]          NORMAL
  Total/HDL Ratio:      5.36             [< 4.5]           HIGH

THYROID FUNCTION:
  TSH:                  3.8 mIU/L        [0.4 - 4.0]       NORMAL
  Free T4:              1.1 ng/dL        [0.8 - 1.8]       NORMAL
  Free T3:              2.9 pg/mL        [2.3 - 4.2]       NORMAL

LIVER FUNCTION:
  SGPT (ALT):           28 U/L           [7 - 56]          NORMAL
  SGOT (AST):           22 U/L           [10 - 40]         NORMAL
  Alkaline Phosphatase: 78 U/L           [44 - 147]        NORMAL
  Total Bilirubin:      0.8 mg/dL        [0.1 - 1.2]       NORMAL

INTERPRETATION:
  - Mild anemia noted (Hemoglobin 11.2 g/dL). Iron studies recommended.
  - Pre-diabetic range: Elevated HbA1c (6.1%) and borderline fasting glucose (108 mg/dL). HOMA-IR suggests insulin resistance.
  - Dyslipidemia: Elevated LDL, Triglycerides, and low HDL. Lifestyle modifications and possible statin therapy advised.
  - Thyroid and liver function within normal limits.

RECOMMENDATIONS:
  1. Serum Iron, TIBC, and Ferritin levels to evaluate anemia
  2. Dietary consultation for diabetic and lipid management
  3. Repeat HbA1c in 3 months
  4. Follow up with referring physician

Pathologist: Dr. Priya Sharma, MD (Pathology)
Lab Director: Dr. Vikram Patel, MD, FCAP
Digitally Verified | Report Generated: 13/03/2024 at 02:45 PM


"}}
